examples.name: GigE interfaces on IOS-XE to verify cross-OS registration, admin-down with description, up with connected status
examples.input:
GigabitEthernet1/0/1 is administratively down, line protocol is down (disabled)
  Hardware is Gigabit Ethernet, address is 0057.d2ff.428c (bia 0057.d2ff.428c)
  Description: desc
  Internet address is 10.1.1.1/24
  MTU 1500 bytes, BW 768 Kbit/sec, DLY 3330 usec,
     reliability 255/255, txload 1/255, rxload 1/255

  Auto-duplex, 1000Mb/s, media type is 10/100/1000BaseTX
  input flow-control is off, output flow-control is unsupported
  ARP type: ARPA, ARP Timeout 04:00:00
  Last input never, output 04:39:18, output hang never
  Last clearing of "show interface" counters 1d02h

  Queueing strategy: fifo
  Output queue: 0/40 (size/max)

examples.name: Multiple tunnel interfaces with AURP, GRE/IP protocols, source tracking via Loopback/GigE, fast tunneling, key/sequencing/checksumming states
examples.input:
Tunnel10 is up, line protocol is down
  Hardware is Tunnel
  Internet address is 1.1.1.3/24
  MTU 9980 bytes, BW 100 Kbit/sec, DLY 50000 usec,
     reliability 255/255, txload 1/255, rxload 1/255
  Encapsulation TUNNEL, loopback not set
  Keepalive not set
  Tunnel linestate evaluation down - no output interface
  Tunnel source 1.1.10.10, destination 1.1.10.11
  Tunnel protocol/transport AURP
  Tunnel TTL 255
  Tunnel transport MTU 1480 bytes
  Tunnel transmit bandwidth 10000000 (kbps)
  Tunnel receive bandwidth 1000000 (kbps)

  Hardware is NIM-4T
  Internet address is 1.0.0.1/8

     reliability 255/255, txload 1/255, rxload 1/255
  Encapsulation X25, loopback not set
  Keepalive set (10 sec)
  X.25 DTE, version 1984, address 170091, state R1, modulo 8, timer 0
      Defaults: idle VC timeout 0
        cisco encapsulation
        input/output window sizes 5/5, packet sizes 128/128
      Timers: T20 180, T21 200, T22 180, T23 180
      Channels: Incoming-only none, Two-way 1-1024, Outgoing-only none
      RESTARTs 1/0 CALLs 0+0/0+0/0+0 DIAGs 0/0
  LAPB DTE, state CONNECT, modulo 8, k 7, N1 12056, N2 20
      T1 3000, T2 0, interface outage (partial T3) 0, T4 0
      VS 1, VR 1, tx NR 1, Remote VR 1, Retransmissions 0
      Queues: U/S frames 0, I frames 0, unack. 0, reTx 0
      IFRAMEs 1/1 RNRs 0/0 REJs 0/0 SABM/Es 0/1 FRMRs 0/0 DISCs 0/0
